release_notes: v1.3.0+14: Implemented a professional logging system, a dedicated log viewer with multi-select, a global crash recovery system, and locale-aware dynamic typography with pro Tamil support.
features: Implemented a professional, icon-free logging system with explicit levels and tagging.
Added a dedicated App Logs viewer with multi-select, batch copy, and ZIP export.
Integrated a principal-grade global crash recovery system for enhanced stability.
Upgraded the typography system to dynamically scale and optimize text for the Tamil language.
fixes: Ensured 'UncutSans' brand font is applied consistently across all UI components.
Cleaned up all informal icons and emojis from debug and diagnostic logs.
